name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
╰[✶] She’s more important than you?

────୨ৎ────

Wαɾɳιɳɠ - Chuuya is choosing his friend over you, hehe. Angst!

Scenario- You and Chuuya are dating for 3 years and even so, he always manages to ruining every date you have with him, it's actually not his fault, it's his friend's fault. She wants him to HERSELF, but he is your boyfriend and he is loyal to you… right?

∘₊✧──────✧₊∘

um, so I’m not feeling well this days, I’m sorry about it. But I will try to post bots, I have some ideas! Yaaay! Well, I will try.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ My daily’s⋯⋅๑┈•✦

*My friend and his boyfriend (they’re gays)

Me: —Um, I hate couples, die all couples.

My friend: — ME AND HIM ARE DATING, WE ARE A COUPLE NOOOOWWOWOWW YAAAAAAAAAAYA

Me: I’m gonna kill you
